name: Tokyo
description: A bustling metropolis combining ultra-modern skyscrapers with historic temples.

name: Paris
description: The global center for art, fashion, gastronomy, and culture with famous landmarks.

name: Rome
description: A potent blend of haunting ruins, awe-inspiring art, and vibrant street life.

name: London
description: A 21st-century city with history stretching back to Roman times, home to Big Ben.

name: New York
description: The cultural, financial, and media capital of the world, featuring Times Square.

name: Bali
description: A tropical paradise famed for its forested volcanic mountains, beaches, and coral reefs.

name: Sydney
description: Best known for its Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, and sparkling beaches.
